content:
# Session 4 (iter-004) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry (project RAW): **16 ‚Üí 14**. FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` 4‚Üí4 (crux relocated, host closed),
  SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean` 8‚Üí6, `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` 4‚Üí4 (untouched).
- 2 prover lanes, both `opus`, both `lake build` green. New axioms: 0 (all new decls
  `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`, `lean_verify`-confirmed).
- Blueprint-doctor: clean (no orphans, no broken refs, no new `axiom`). `dag-query gaps`: 0.

## Lane 1 ‚Äî SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean` (LocalizedMonoidal route, iter-004 pivot)
The pc004/analogist route change landed: the Mathlib `CategoryTheory.LocalizedMonoidal L W Œµ`
symmetric-monoidal synonym is now instantiated end-to-end, axiom-clean.

**Solved (axiom-clean):**
- `W_isMonoidal` (instance) ‚Äî the single new precondition; whiskerRight = proved
  `ztensor_whisker_localIso`, whiskerLeft by braiding conjugation, packaged in
  `isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight`.
- `localizedMonoidalUnitIso` ‚Äî `Œµ = sheafificationCounitIso (unitModule X)`, works because
  `(toPresheafOfModules X).obj (unitModule X) = ùüô_(MonoidalPresheaf X)` by `rfl`.
- `modulesLocalizedMonoidal` (abbrev) ‚Äî `MonoidalCategory`/`BraidedCategory`/`SymmetricCategory`
  all resolve on the synonym ‚áí pentagon/triangle/hexagon for free.
- `tensorPowAdd_rightUnit` (base), `tensorPowAdd_braiding` (base) ‚Äî pure presheaf-descended facts
  (`tensorBraiding_unitModule`, `tensorBraiding_symm`); no synonym needed.

**Load-bearing engineering facts (verified, see task_result):**
1. `MonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj)` does NOT synthesize on the bare form ‚Äî
   only on `MonoidalPresheaf X = PresheafOfModules (‚Ä¶ ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ ‚Ä¶)`. Fixed by private re-export
   instances `pshModMonoidal`/`Braided`/`Symmetric` (`:= inferInstanceAs`).
2. `L`/`W` fed to `LocalizedMonoidal` must be the **literal** `PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ùüô ‚Ä¶)`
   / `inverseImage` class ‚Äî wrapping in an `abbrev` (or domain-ascribing `L` to `MonoidalPresheaf X`)
   blocks the `IsLocalization` discr-tree key. The synonym must live at `Type (u+1)`.
3. `rw [show tensorPow L 0 = unitModule X from rfl]` FAILS ("motive not type correct"); the idiom is a
   leading whole-goal `show ‚Ä¶ unitModule X ‚Ä¶` BEFORE any `rw`. `eqToIso` Nat-reindexers close by
   `congr 1` (proof irrelevance); blind `simp [‚Üê eqToIso_trans]` hits max-recursion.

**Blocked (6 sorries):** `tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`(succ), `tensorPowAdd_braiding`(succ),
`tensorPowAdd_assoc`(base+succ), `sectionMul_assoc_core`, `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`. ALL reduce to one
obstacle: the hand-built `tensorObj F G = sheafification.obj(F.toPr ‚äó_p G.toPr)` is **NOT
definitionally** the localized `F ‚äó_loc G = ((tensorBifunctor L W Œµ).obj F).obj G`. The coherence
transfer needs explicit Œº-transport (object identification `tensorObj F G ‚âÖ F ‚äó_loc G`) threaded
through each coherence ‚Äî i.e. the 4 not-yet-built **bridge lemmas** (`tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`,
`tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding`, `tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor`,
`tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_localizedRightUnitor`). Mathlib supplies the component formulas
(`Localization.Monoidal.{associator_hom_app, leftUnitor_hom_app, Œº, braidingNatIso_hom_app,
Œº_natural_left/right}`). Fallback = Option A (rewire hand-built defs onto the synonym's ‚äó ‚Äî refactor).

## Lane 2 ‚Äî FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean` (b2 crux)
- **`pullback_spec_tilde_iso_restriction_naturality`: CLOSED** (sorry-free body). The pc004-CHURNING
  corrective: extracted the post-`Iso.ext` crux as the blueprint-pinned standalone lemma
  `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` and closed the host by
  `exact pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural œà œÜ œÅ M`. Resolves what was a dangling `\lean{}` pin.
  (Transitively sorry-backed through the new lemma.)
- **`pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural`: PARTIAL** ‚Äî the genuine 2-categorical
  pseudo-functoriality crux: naturality of the opaque `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` (=
  `conjugateIsoEquiv`-conjugate of `gammaPushforwardNatIso`) across `chartBaseChange_ring_square`.
  Advanced from a bare `Iso.ext` to a **verified compiling 4-step transpose reduction**:
  `Iso.ext` ‚Üí `.hom` cleanup ‚Üí `Iso.eq_comp_inv` rearrangement ‚Üí first `homEquiv`-injective peel
  (`pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`) ‚Üí `homEquiv_unit` expansion. Residual: cancel the shared `unit`
  prefix, 2 more transpose peels, and the deep per-leg identification of each `pullback_spec_tilde_iso`
  transpose with `gammaPushforwardNatIso` via `unit_conjugateEquiv` (~150-300 LOC; the conjugate
  identity is the real un-verified risk).

## Review subagent findings (reports archived in logs/iter-004/; landed in recommendations.md)
- **audit004** (lean-auditor, no-bias): 15 must-fix / 6 major / 3 minor. SNAP additions explicitly
  certified **axiom-clean** (no PROBE scaffolding left). The 15 must-fix are mostly strategy-known
  sorries the no-bias auditor cannot triage (3 dead mate riders, 4 Global next-phase, 6 SNAP
  bridge-gated, 1 live FBC crux). **Genuinely new/actionable:** false documentation inside the DEAD
  `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` sorry body ‚Äî cites three non-existent "proved" lemmas
  (`base_change_mate_unit_value`, `base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_unitExpand`,
  `base_change_mate_extendScalars_inner_value_counit`) and an out-of-bounds `@~1999` pointer (file is
  1666 lines). Persists from audit003. Plus dead stacked `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` on a
  `/-!` comment (lines 1312-1315) and ~90 lines of proof-as-comment. Transitive-sorry-without-disclosure
  (major) on graded-ring instances `instGMonoid`‚Üí`sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` and on the two
  delegating FBC/Global decls.
- **fbc004** (lvbc): PASS, 0 must-fix / 0 major / 2 minor. New lemma pin resolves + signature matches;
  no dangling pins (the dead-mate `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`/`flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso`
  pins resolve; `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` has no `\lean{}` pin). Minors: host block draws a
  Œì-section square while its pin targets the sheaf-level iso (cross-referenced, equivalent); new lemma's
  transpose sketch lightly under-specified.
- **snap004** (lvbc): PASS, 0 red flags / 2 minor. 3 new defs match precisely + axiom-clean; base cases
  faithful; 4 bridge lemmas correctly blueprint-only/unmarked. Minors: bridge-lemma proof sketches name
  only `associator_hom_app` (not the localized braiding/unitor component formulas); the
  `sectionsMul`-whiskering naturality bricks needed by `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` aren't previewed as
  blueprint blocks.

## Key patterns discovered
- **Localization-as-monoidal dodge**: when a full `MonoidalCategory` instance on a category `E`
  collides with existing structure, use Mathlib's `LocalizedMonoidal L W Œµ` type synonym ‚Äî coherences
  become literal Mathlib laws. Cost: a non-defeq object identification (Œº-transport) to bridge any
  hand-built tensor to the synonym's.
- **Crux extraction to resolve CHURNING**: moving a `post-Iso.ext` residual into its own
  blueprint-pinned lemma both closes the host (sorry-free delegation) and gives the next prover a
  smaller, named target ‚Äî turning a churning monolith into a frontier node.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. All Mathlib anchors (`thm:localizedMonoidal_mathlib`, `lem:*_mathlib`) already carry
  `\mathlibok` (planner-authored this iter); `sync_leanok` (iter 4, sha e4bfab1, +11/-0) added the
  statement `\leanok`s on `def:W_isMonoidal`/`localizedMonoidalUnitIso`/`modulesLocalizedMonoidal`/
  `lem:pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural`. No `\lean{}` renames, no stale `\notready`, no
  laundering override needed ‚Äî the transitive-sorry proof blocks are correctly left unmarked.
